Alpha 1Magic Shop & Spellbook Generators Available

Generate D&D 5e content withVizier's Vault

Create magic shops, encounters, spellbooks, battle maps, and worlds for your D&D 5e 2024 campaigns. Built for game masters to create and then share with their players.

Get StartedLearn more

Tools

D&D 5e Content Generators

Tools for game masters to generate various things in their D&D 5e 2024 campaigns and then to share with their players.

Magic Shop Generator

Alpha 1

Generate magic shops based on city population, wealth, and magicness.

World Generator

Spellbook Generator

Alpha 1

Create wizard spellbooks by selecting level, schools of magic, and probability settings.

Encounter Generator

Alpha 2

Generate balanced encounters based on party composition, biome, and travel conditions.

Party ManagementBattle Map Generator

Party Management

Alpha 2

Manage party composition, balance, and progress tracking.

Region Generator

Alpha 3

Generate smaller hexcrawl regions with 1-mile hexes, like islands, peninsulas, bays, inland areas, and coastal regions.

Battle Map GeneratorEncounter GeneratorParty Management

Battle Map Generator

Alpha 4

Create battle maps with geographical features, weather, and customizable grid settings.

Continent Generator

Alpha 4

Generate continent-scale hexcrawl maps with up to 3-mile hexes, featuring multiple regions, kingdoms, and large-scale terrain features.

Region GeneratorBattle Map GeneratorEncounter GeneratorParty Management

World Generator

Alpha 5

Generate complete hex worlds with up to 24-mile hexes, weather simulation, fog of war, and party tracking.

Continent GeneratorRegion GeneratorBattle Map GeneratorEncounter GeneratorMagic Shop GeneratorParty Management

Star System Generator

Alpha 6

Create star systems with multiple worlds, planets, and celestial bodies.

World Generator

Galaxy Generator

Alpha 7

Generate entire galaxies with multiple star systems and cosmic structures.

Star System Generator

Features

Vizier's Vault Capabilities

Features designed to streamline your D&D campaign preparation and management.

Customizable Settings

Adjust nearly everything related to generation across all tools.

BASIC

Permalink Generation

Create shareable links to your generated content.

BASIC

Image Export

Export generated maps as images.

FREE

VTT Export

Export generated maps as VTT files where possible.

FREE

CSV Export

Export generations as CSV files.

FREE

Custom Worlds and Cities

Create and customize your own worlds and cities for use in the Magic Shop Generator, World Generator, and Encounter Generator.

BASIC

Benefits

Streamline Your D&D Campaign

Focus on storytelling and player engagement while our tools handle the mechanical aspects of preparation and play.

01

Save Hours of Prep

Spin up encounters, loot, and maps in minutes so you can spend more time on story and play.
02

Balanced, Ready-to-Run Content

Auto-tuned difficulty and scalable recommendations reduce guesswork and keep sessions flowing.
03

Frictionless Session Flow

Fast, clean UI and smart defaults minimize clicks and context switching during the game.
04

Share and Reuse Easily

One-click links and exports let you hand off content to players or reuse across campaigns.
